data.body:
## Description
Create two dedicated plugin agent definition files by extracting and enhancing existing preplanning prompts.

**plugins/dso/agents/red-team-reviewer.md**:
- Frontmatter: name: red-team-reviewer, model: opus, description
- Extract content from plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/prompts/red-team-review.md
- Add 6th taxonomy category: Consumer Impact / Operational Readiness — stories that create or modify systems consumed by other parts of the codebase without verifying consumers still work
- Add Consumer Enumeration directive: before analyzing stories, enumerate all known consumers of the system being modified (scripts, hooks, skills, tests that import/call/reference it)
- Preserve all 5 existing taxonomy categories exactly

**plugins/dso/agents/blue-team-filter.md**:
- Frontmatter: name: blue-team-filter, model: sonnet, description
- Extract content from plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/prompts/blue-team-review.md
- Add artifact persistence instructions: after filtering, write the full exchange (accepted findings, rejected findings with rationale) to ARTIFACTS_DIR/adversarial-review-<epic-id>.json where ARTIFACTS_DIR is resolved via get_artifacts_dir from hooks/lib/deps.sh
- Add one-line ticket comment instruction referencing the artifact file
- Preserve all existing filtering criteria exactly

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/agents/red-team-reviewer.md — Create
- plugins/dso/agents/blue-team-filter.md — Create

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Red team agent file exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/red-team-reviewer.md
- [ ] Blue team agent file exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/blue-team-filter.md
- [ ] Red team has Consumer Impact taxonomy
  Verify: grep -q 'Consumer Impact' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/red-team-reviewer.md
- [ ] Red team has Consumer Enumeration directive
  Verify: grep -q 'Consumer Enumeration' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/red-team-reviewer.md
- [ ] Blue team has artifact persistence
  Verify: grep -q 'adversarial-review' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/blue-team-filter.md
- [ ] All agent tests pass
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && poetry run pytest tests/skills/test_red_team_reviewer_agent.py tests/skills/test_blue_team_filter_agent.py --tb=short -q

**Escalation policy**: Escalate to the user whenever you do not have high confidence.
